text: As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484C.020 to 484C.105 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484C
##### § 484C.010 — Definitions.

As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484C.020 to 484C.105 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.

subsections.text: As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 484C.020 to 484C.105 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
